arts.ttl: What can Barcelona expect from AS Monaco?
arts.sum: Barcelona will kick off their UEFA Champions League campaign with a tricky trip away to AS Monaco. What can Hansi Flick’s side expect during their trip to the Principality? In…

arts.ttl: Barcelona predicted XI v Monaco: Dani Olmo and Gavi out
arts.sum: Hansi Flick is without multiple players as Barcelona kick off their UEFA Champions League campaign, against AS Monaco, at the Stade Louis II on Thursday night. Dani Olmo’s injury, suffered…

arts.ttl: Monaco predicted XI v Barcelona: Lamine Camara to start following injury
arts.sum: AS Monaco were provided with a boost ahead of their UEFA Champions League opener against Barcelona, with Lamine Camara deemed fit to start, despite being stretchered off during Saturday’s win…

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Chelsea considering January move for 'fantastic' £51m Barcelona star
arts.sum: Despite the influx of signings at Stamford Bridge this summer, Enzo Maresca doesn’t quite seem satisfied that his Chelsea squad is well enough equipped in...

arts.ttl: Possible lineup for Barcelona against Monaco in Champions League opener
arts.sum: FC Barcelona head to the principality of Monaco for their Champions League opener as they face Les Rouges et Blanc who have also started well in Ligue 1 with Adi Hütter’s men sitting in third place in the table with three games and one draw from their opening four fixtures. Ter Stegen; Koundé, Cubarsí, Iñigo, Balde; Casadó, Pedri; Lamine, Raphinha, Ferran; and Lewandowski are all set to start for Barça with Pedri set to start in an attacking midfield capacity.

arts.ttl: Monaco vs Barcelona: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Barcelona are aiming to continue their perfect record under Hansi Flick when they begin their Champions League campaign at AS Monaco on Thursday evening. The new manager of the Catalan giants hasn't tasted defeat since losing to Monaco 3-0 in pre-season, winning all five of Barcelona's La Liga games.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick admits ‘I feel guilty’ for one Barcelona star’s injury
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has admitted that he takes personal responsibility for the injury setback suffered by a member of his midfield ranks this week. The player in question?…

arts.ttl: On-loan Vitor Roque shows both why Barcelona signed him and let him go vs Getafe
arts.sum: The display put forth by Barcelona youngster Vitor Roque for Real Betis this evening highlighted both exactly why the Blaugrana brought him in in the first place, and why they…

arts.ttl: EA FC 25: Lamine Yamal's rating has been leaked and it's shocking
arts.sum: With ratings yet to be finalised for a number of players, many have been anticipating where Barcelona's wonderkid will rank among the game's best and brightest. Whether or not Yamal's rating should be higher is up for debate - as are most of EA's ratings in their flagship sports game - but what is surprising is that, if leaks are accurate, the Spain star will only have an overall pace stat of 82 despite his blistering speed.

arts.ttl: ‘That’s the key’ - Monaco boss talks defending Lewandowski, Raphinha and Yamal
arts.sum: Monaco boss Adi Hutter has told his team to go ‘all out’ when it comes to defending against Barcelona in the Champions League on Thursday. Hansi Flick takes his team to France after making a perfect start to the new La Liga season, and Hutter says his players must be brave.
